creator: mail@ozzmosis.com
text:
>> -COMMENT= FTN File ticker
>> +COMMENT= FidoNet file ticker, development version
> Why did you change comment and pkg-descr? FTN File ticker seems
> more wide and correct, as afaik husky doesn't only support fidonet.

FTN is probably more correct.  It is not a commonly-known acronym
outside of FidoNet though.

>> .include "${PORTSDIR}/news/husky-base/Makefile.inc"
> Did you mean ${PORTSDIR}/news/husky-base-devel/Makefile.inc?

I think so.
